name: Fully Booked
overview:
It's never seen before! This is a reality show where six idols from GMMTV will fly across the sky to open a Thai restaurant in Japan!

Cook, serve, and run, they'll get it all done from the beginning to the end without any help! Stay tuned to see how this adventure will turn out.

trailers.title: FULLY BOOKED Reality ที่ 6 หนุ่มจาก GMMTV จะไปเปิดร้านอาหารไทยที่ญี่ปุ่น! [Eng Sub]
